mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM news
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news (title, content, cover_image, author, view_count) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{author}, #{viewCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE news SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
